title: Google in talks with Samsung to make part of next-gen chip, The Information reports
sentences: Google in talks with Samsung to make part of next-gen chip, The Information reports Alphabet's Google is in talks with Samsung Electronics to manufacture part of its ‚Äånext-generation chip, The Information reported on Thursday, citing ‚Äåtwo people familiar with the matter.

Google plans for Taiwan's TSMC to ‚Äãmake the main part of the chip, codenamed 'Icefish,' while Samsung may produce a separate component that helps connect it to memory using its 2-nanometer production technology, the report ‚Äåsaid.

The chip industry has ‚ÅÝbeen grappling with a capacity crunch, as TSMC, the world's largest contract chipmaker, works ‚ÅÝto keep up with surging demand and avoid becoming a bottleneck in the global supply chain amid the AI ‚Äãboom.
